input.background: We propose to draw boxplots for the air sample data presented in prior illustrations (see Table 4.2).
input.question: Draw a boxplot for site 2 data: 32, 33, 34, 36, 36, 38, 39, 40.

output.answer: 1. The five-point summary is 32, 33.5, 36, 38.5, 40. The box extends from 33.5 to 38.5. A line for the median is drawn inside the box at 36. 2. IQR=38.5-33.5=5. Fence Lower=33.5-(1.5)(5)=26. Fence Upper=38.5+(1.5)(5)=46. 3. There are no outside values in this group. 4. The lower inside value is 32. A whisker is drawn from Q1 to this lower inside value. The upper inside value is 42. A whisker is drawn from Q3 to this upper inside value.

site_2_data.description: Air sample data values for site 2 used to draw a boxplot.
